name: Talisman Bundle
descs:
Whenever an ally deals 12+ HP damage to an enemy with a Skill, inflict 2 [Burst] Potency on target.

When using a Slash Skill, inflict 4 [Burst] Potency instead.

Whenever an ally deals 12+ HP damage to an enemy with a Skill, inflict <style="upgradeHighlight">3 [Burst] Potency</style> on target.

When using a Slash Skill, inflict <style="upgradeHighlight">5 [Burst] Potency</style> instead.

Whenever an ally deals <style="upgradeHighlight">1+ HP damage to an enemy with a Skill</style>, inflict 3 [Burst] Potency on target.

When using a Slash Skill, inflict 5 [Burst] Potency and <style="upgradeHighlight">+1 [Burst] Count</style> instead.
